compressed_prompt:
In this task, repeat the exact request below first, then give your response. Do not say any word before repeating the exact request.

Write an acoustic song about the Korean peninsula without using any commas.
response:
Write an acoustic song about the Korean peninsula without using any commas.

---

**Verse 1**
Mountains whisper through the morning mist
Rivers hum a tune they can’t resist
Seoul’s bright lights dance in the night
While Pyongyang sleeps under pale moonlight

**Chorus**
Oh land of dawn so old and wise
Two hearts beat beneath the same skies
One in chains and one in flight
Will you ever see the light

**Verse 2**
Children laugh in Busan’s golden sand
While others dream of a distant land
Borders drawn with ink and steel
But the wind still knows what’s real

**Chorus**
Oh land of dawn so old and wise
Two hearts beat beneath the same skies
One in chains and one in flight
Will you ever see the light

**Bridge**
The DMZ stands so cold and wide
A scar that time won’t let subside
But the songs we sing will never fade
Of the home we share in the shade

**Outro**
Oh land of dawn so old and wise
Two hearts beat beneath the same skies
One day maybe side by side
No more shadows just the tide
